code: import React from'react';import{motion}from'framer-motion';import'./Projects.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Projects=()=>{const projects=[{title:"Multi-Tier Web Application",description:"Deployed scalable 3-tier architecture with auto-scaling, load balancing, and RDS Multi-AZ setup.",tags:["EC2","ALB","RDS","CloudFormation"]},{title:"Serverless Data Pipeline",description:"Built event-driven data processing pipeline using Lambda, S3, and DynamoDB with real-time analytics.",tags:["Lambda","S3","DynamoDB","Kinesis"]},{title:"CI/CD Pipeline",description:"Implemented automated deployment pipeline with testing, security scanning, and blue-green deployments.",tags:["CodePipeline","CodeBuild","ECS","Terraform"]}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{id:"projects",className:"projects-section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.h2,{className:"section-title",initial:{opacity:0,y:-20},whileInView:{opacity:1,y:0},transition:{duration:0.6},viewport:{once:true},children:"Featured Projects"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"project-grid",children:projects.map((project,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(motion.div,{className:"project-card",initial:{opacity:0,y:50},whileInView:{opacity:1,y:0},transition:{delay:index*0.2,duration:0.6},whileHover:{y:-10},viewport:{once:true},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"project-header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:project.title})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"project-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:project.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"tech-tags",children:project.tags.map((tag,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.span,{className:"tech-tag",whileHover:{scale:1.1},children:tag},i))})]})]},index))})]})});};export default Projects;
